title: Pecteilis yachangensis
taxonomy: Pecteilis yachangensis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Pecteilis, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The genus Pecteilis is further divided into several species, with Pecteilis yachangensis being one of the notable ones. The classification of Pecteilis yachangensis is based on its physical characteristics and genetic analysis. Pecteilis yachangensis is native to China, where it grows in the wild.
